Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPEPTS ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; Q ; API ; -- Get the method signature for an API ;;Name^Resource^Method^Routine^Mode ;;search^patient^SRCHPAT^DVPFPT1^JSON ;;read^patient^RDPAT^DVPFPT^JSON ;;read^allergyintolerance^RDALRG^DVPALL1^JSON ;;search^allergyintolerance^SRCHALRG^DVPALL2^JSON ;;read^medication^RDMEDS^DVPMEDS1^JSON ;;search^medication^SRCHMEDS^DVPMEDS2^JSON ;;read^immunization^RDIMM^DVPIMM1^JSON ;;search^immunization^SRCHIMM^DVPIMM2^JSON ;;read^condition^RDCOND^DVPCOND1^JSON ;;search^condition^SRCHCOND^DVPCOND2^JSON ;;read^patientfacilitylist^RDPTFL^DVPDV5^JSON ;;read^medicationstatement^RDMS^DVPMS^JSON ;;search^medicationstatement^SRCHMS^DVPMS^JSON ;;read^medicationrequest^RDMR^DVPMR^JSON ;;search^medicationrequest^SRCHMR^DVPMR^JSON ;;read^organization^RDORG^DVPORG1^JSON ;;search^organization^SRCHORG^DVPORG2^JSON ;;read^location^RDLOC^DVPLOC1^JSON ;;search^location^SRCHLOC^DVPLOC2^JSON ;;read^practitioner^RDPRC^DVPPRC1^JSON ;;search^practitioner^SRCHPRC^DVPPRC2^JSON ;;read^procedure^RDPROC^DVPPROC^JSON ;;search^procedure^SRCPROC^DVPPROC^JSON ;;read^vital-signs^RDVS^DVPVS1^JSON ;;search^vital-signs^SRCHVS^DVPVS2^JSON ;;read^smoking-status^RDSS^DVPSS1^JSON ;;search^smoking-status^SRCHSS^DVPSS2^JSON ;;getversion^manifest^GETVER^DVPMAN^JSON ;;getdbversion^manifest^GETDBVER^DVPMAN^JSON ;;uploadroutine^manifest^ROUINSTL^DVPDV6^JSON ;;executemu^manifest^MUEXEC^DVPDV6^JSON ;;timeout^manifest^TIMEOUT^DVPDV6^JSON ;;trigger^error^ERR^DVPMU90^JSON ;;$$END$$ ;
